## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Scrunch AI dashboard functionality, metrics, and potential improvements with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent product enhancements have changed some metric calculations and dashboard features](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Competitive presence metrics and prompt/response data interpretation require clarification](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [API integration and improved data visualization options (e.g., Looker Studio) are available for enhanced reporting](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

## Topics

### Dashboard Updates and Metric Changes

  - [Product enhancements rolled out recently, affecting metric calculations and dashboard features](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [New time frame filters added (e.g., last 4 weeks, 12 weeks), with custom date range coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Prompt and response calculations explained: seed prompts × platforms = total prompts](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

### Competitive Presence and Citation Metrics

  - [Competitive presence shows frequency of company mentions across all responses](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Citations indicate specific references or attributions in responses](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Competitors section shows presence per platform, not an aggregate of all responses](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Suggestion made to replace percentage with platform logos for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Key Topics and Prompt Categorization

  - [CSV upload takes precedence in assigning key topics to prompts](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [System attempts to categorize prompts without specified topics based on intent](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Manual changes to categories may cause unexpected recategorization of prompts](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Prompt Design and Search Query Condensation

  - [Platforms condense long-tail prompts into shorter search queries](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Condensation patterns are not always predictable or consistent](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Recommendation to continue using prompt variants until more platform guidance is available](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

### API and Reporting Features

  - [API access available to GrowthX at no additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [Looker Studio integration possible for improved data visualization and client reporting](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Current platform lacks robust reporting features, but improvements are in development](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Book follow-up meeting to discuss additional questions and API integration](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Explore Looker Studio integration for enhanced data visualization](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Share meeting insights with the rest of the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Andrew to confirm prompt recategorization behavior with engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Consider implementing suggestion to replace percentage with platform logos in competitors section](https://fathom.video/share/ucFyy3cvWU6bex3iKgrenifDxKU4C9Nw?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
